channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lynx stun Liberty with 95-93 overtime win in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Minnesota coach Cheryl Reeve has seen a lot in her incredible career that has included four WNBA championships. The historic rally by the Lynx to beat New York 95-93 in a wild Game 1 of the WNBA Finals ranks right up there as one of the best moments.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lions star David Montgomery reveals fantasy football managers played part in battle with suicidal thoughts
item.description: Detroit Lions veteran running back David Montgomery revealed that he dealt with suicidal thoughts during his time with the Chicago Bears, and fantasy football managers added to it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Adam Svensson has personal-best 60 to lead in Utah's return to PGA Tour after 61 years
item.description: Adam Svensson has welcomed Utah back to the PGA Tour schedule with the lowest round of the Canadian's career on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Embattled Packers receiver returns to practice field after serving one-game suspension
item.description: Packers wide receiver Romeo Doubs returned to practice Wednesday after serving a one-game suspension issued by the team for missing two practices before Sunday's game against the Rams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Phillies end 3rd straight October without World Series championship
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Carlos Estévez crouched on the mound and turned his head toward center field as the Phillies reliever tracked the flight of Francisco Lindor’s long drive into the outfield.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Rock fires off warning after return at WWE Bad Blood stuns fans
item.description: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson made an epic return to WWE on Saturday and, on Thursday, he had a warning for a few of his rivals with WrestleMania on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady donates $100,000 toward hurricane relief in Florida
item.description: NFL legend Tom Brady donated $100,000 toward hurricane relief in Florida after Hurricanes Milton and Helene devastated parts of the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mets win, advance to NLCS for the first time since 2015
item.description: NEW YORK — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Las Vegas Raiders 34-18
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— In the second quarter, with the Broncos trailing 10-3 and defending the goal line, Gardner Minshew threw an interception to Patrick Surtain II, who returned it for a 100-yard touchdown. The pick-six was one of Surtain’s two interceptions on the night.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres fandom in full force at first of three postseason watch parties
item.description: The Padres' quest for postseason glory continues and fans are along for the thrilling journey. Despite Saturday night's game being held in Los Angeles at Dodgers Stadium, the first of three watch parties kicked off with a packed house at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Grand Junction softball pours it on Palisade for big league win
item.description: With a clear blue sky and beautiful Mt. Garfield as the backdrop at Palisade High School, it was the Grand Junction Tigers show on the softball field.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
